description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a sleek, angular body with a predominantly brown metallic exterior accented by red highlights along the edges and wing surfaces. The cockpit area is defined by large, segmented windows, providing ample visibility for the crew. Two wide, flat wings extend from the midsection, each with visible paneling and red trim, suggesting reinforced construction. The rear of the vehicle is equipped with vertical stabilizers and what appear to be engine exhausts or thrusters, indicating high mobility. The undercarriage is relatively flat, with no visible wheels or landing gear, implying a hover or anti-gravity propulsion system. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function and durability.
description: A brown, angular combat tactical vehicle with red accents, large cockpit windows, and wide, flat wings. The design is robust and functional, with visible thrusters and reinforced surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, large cockpit windows, and the full span of the wide, red-accented wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, segmented cockpit windows, and the flat undercarriage with visible wing structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts or thrusters, and the back edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, wing, and rear stabilizer details.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in solid, angular armor plating with moderate thickness; no modular or reactive panels are visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid brown with red accent lines; no distinct camouflage pattern.
